name: elemental-input
description: Animated effect text field React component — type magic words to trigger fire, water, ice and more
author: Khoa Pham <onmyway133@gmail.com>

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --external react --external react-dom --sourcemap && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist/cjs-tmp --format cjs --external react --external react-dom --sourcemap && mv dist/cjs-tmp/index.js dist/index.cjs && rm -rf dist/cjs-tmp && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --external react --external react-dom --sourcemap --watch
